syncErrorNoUpstream: No upstream branch. Set it in terminal
syncErrorDiverged: Branches diverged. Rebase or merge in terminal
syncErrorLocalChanges: Local changes would be overwritten. Commit or stash first
claudePromptDiverged: Git sync failed. {branch} has diverged from {upstream}. Please rebase onto the latest origin and resolve any conflicts.
claudePromptRejected: Git push was rejected. There appear to be new commits on {upstream}. Please pull to merge, then push again.
claudePromptAuth: Git authentication failed. Please check the credential helper or SSH configuration and try again.
claudePromptNoUpstream: The {branch} branch has no upstream. Please push to origin and set up the tracking branch.
claudePromptLocalChanges: Git pull failed because local uncommitted changes would be overwritten by merge. Please stash or commit the changes, pull from {upstream}, and reapply the stash if you stashed.
claudePromptTimeout: Git sync timed out. Please check the network connection and retry.
claudePromptGeneric: Git sync failed. Please review the error below and resolve it.
